title: Scope providers deliberately
description: Declare where an injectable lives (root, route, or component) so instance count and lifetime are intentional.
body: Use when creating or wiring a service. Do not provide the same service in multiple component providers arrays when you expect one shared instance. Actions: use providedIn: 'root' for an app-wide singleton, a route/component provider for a scoped instance whose lifetime matches that subtree, and understand that each component-level provider creates a new instance per component. Validation signals include a test asserting two components share or do not share state as intended. Risk boundary: an accidental second instance splits state silently (one component writes, another reads stale), and a service holding secrets must not be provided into a lazily loaded client bundle it should not reach.
